---
title: "Pipeline Library (TransformsV2)"
format: html
---

The **pipeline library** is the on-disk catalog of saved [`PipelineDescriptor`](../../../src/TransformsV2/core/PipelineLoader.hpp) JSON files. It is separate from Triage Session command sequences and from workspace-embedded pipeline provenance.

See [pipeline_library_roadmap.md](pipeline_library_roadmap.md) for the full implementation plan.

## Storage location

Under the application config directory (`StateManager::configDir()`):

```
{config_dir}/pipelines/transforms_v2/*.json
```

On Linux this is typically `~/.config/WhiskerToolbox/pipelines/transforms_v2/`.

## Core API (Qt-free)

Headers live in `src/TransformsV2/core/`:

| Function | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| `defaultUserPipelineDirectory(config_dir)` | Resolve the library path |
| `ensureUserPipelineDirectory(config_dir)` | Create the directory tree |
| `sanitizePipelineFilename(name)` | Filesystem-safe stem from a display name |
| `listPipelineFiles(directory)` | List `*.json` entries with display names |
| `loadPipelineDescriptorFromFile(path)` | Parse descriptor JSON |
| `savePipelineDescriptorToFile(path, descriptor)` | Write descriptor JSON |
| `deletePipelineFile(path)` | Remove a library file |
| `savePipelineToFile(path, descriptor)` | Same write path via `PipelineLoader` |
| `loadPipelineDescriptorFromJsonFile(path)` | Parse-only load (no `TransformPipeline` build) |

To execute a saved file, use `loadPipelineFromFile` (builds a `TransformPipeline`).

## JSON format

Files use the `PipelineDescriptor` schema documented in [`PipelineLoader.hpp`](../../../src/TransformsV2/core/PipelineLoader.hpp): `metadata`, optional `pre_reductions`, `steps`, optional `range_reduction`.

## Pipeline library dialog (Phase 3)

[`PipelineLibraryDialog`](../../../src/WhiskerToolbox/TransformsV2_Widget/UI/PipelineLibraryDialog.hpp) provides:

- Browse saved pipelines with JSON preview
- **Load** (closes dialog and applies to TransformsV2 widget)
- **Save to Library**, **Delete**, **Import...**, **Export...**, **Open Folder**

The TransformsV2 JSON panel adds **Library...** and **Save to Library** shortcuts that use the same directory.

## Tensor column configuration (Phase 4)

[`ColumnConfigDialog`](../../../src/WhiskerToolbox/DataInspector_Widget/TensorData/ColumnConfigDialog.cpp) adds **Load from Library...**, which opens the same `PipelineLibraryDialog`. The library directory is resolved from `StateManager::configDir()` when the Data Inspector is registered and forwarded through `TensorDesigner`.

## Widget integration (Phase 2)

[`TransformsV2Properties_Widget`](../../../src/WhiskerToolbox/TransformsV2_Widget/UI/TransformsV2Properties_Widget.cpp):

- `currentPipelineDescriptor()` merges UI steps with `metadata` / `pre_reductions` / `range_reduction` from the JSON panel.
- Load/Save use `AppFileDialog` with IDs `transformv2_pipeline_open` and `transformv2_pipeline_save`, defaulting to the user library directory.
- `TransformsV2WidgetModule::registerTypes` receives `StateManager::configDir()` and ensures `pipelines/transforms_v2/` exists at widget construction.

## Tests

- [`test_pipeline_library.test.cpp`](../../../tests/TransformsV2/test_pipeline_library.test.cpp) — path helpers, sanitization, catalog listing, file I/O.
- [`TransformsV2Widget.test.cpp`](../../../tests/WhiskerToolbox/TransformsV2_Widget/TransformsV2Widget.test.cpp) — widget JSON round-trip with `pre_reductions` preserved after Apply and step-list edits.
